name: Raynor
description: A Physical Damage Assassin that can keep enemies away.
title: Renegade Commander
info: Ex-Confederate Marshal James Raynor has stood against whatever the universe can throw at him and survived. He stands as a beacon of hope among enigmatic aliens and monsters, fighting for justice in a cold uncaring universe.

Raynor.name: Penetrating Round
Raynor.description: Deal 205 (+4% per level) damage, knock back, and Slow enemies in a line by 20% for 2 seconds. Enemies close to Raynor are knocked back further.

Raynor.name: Inspire
Raynor.description: Raynor and all nearby allied Minions and Mercenaries gain 30% Attack Speed and 10% Movement Speed for 4 seconds.  Casting Inspire resets Raynor's Basic Attack cooldown.

Raynor.name: Adrenaline Rush
Raynor.description: Heal Raynor for 25% of his maximum Health over 1 second. Raynor's Basic Attacks reduce this cooldown by 0.5 seconds, increased to 1 second against Heroes.

Raynor.name: Hyperion
Raynor.description: Order the Hyperion to make a strafing run for 12 seconds, hitting up to 4 enemies for 66 (+4% per level) damage every second. Every 4 seconds, it can fire its Yamato Cannon at a Structure, dealing 794 (+4% per level) damage.

Raynor.name: Raynor's Raider
Raynor.description: Summon a Banshee that assists Raynor. The Banshee deals 84 (+4% per level) damage per second and regenerates 75 (+4% per level) Health per second if it hasn't taken damage in the last 4 seconds. Can reactivate to retarget or move the Banshee.  The Banshee respawns automatically after 45 seconds.

Raynor.name: Give 'Em Some Pepper
Raynor.description: Every 4th Basic Attack splashes in a small area and deals 125% more damage to the main target.

1.name: Exterminator
1.description: Basic Attacks deal 50% more damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters. This is increased to 125% while Inspire is active.  Passive: Inspire does not expire on friendly Minions and Mercenaries.

1.name: Veteran Marksman
1.description: Quest: Every time the primary target of Give 'Em Some Pepper is a Hero, permanently increase its damage bonus by 0.75%.  Gambit: Gain 60% bonus Give 'Em Some Pepper damage. Every death reduces this bonus by 15%.

1.name: Ace In The Hole
1.description: Deal 12% more damage to Stunned or Slowed Heroes.  Enemy Heroes hit by Give 'Em Some Pepper are Slowed by 10% for 2.5 seconds.

4.name: Fight or Flight
4.description: Reduce Adrenaline Rush's cooldown by 10 seconds. Casting Adrenaline Rush grants 25 Armor for 3 seconds.

4.name: Sustaining Rounds
4.description: Give 'Em Some Pepper heals Raynor for 3% of his maximum Health, increased to 6% if the primary target is a Hero.

4.name: Behemoth Armor
4.description: Gain 200 bonus maximum Health.   Quest: Every time Give 'Em Some Pepper's primary target is a Hero, gain an additional 8 maximum Health.

7.name: Heavy Slugs
7.description: Increase Penetrating Round's Slow by 15% and its duration by 2 seconds.

7.name: Fuel The Rush
7.description: While Inspire is active, Adrenaline Rush's cooldown reduction from Basic Attacks is increased to 2.25 seconds against non-Heroes, and to 4.5 seconds against Heroes.  Passive: Reduce the Mana cost of Adrenaline Rush from 75 to 45.

7.name: Unstable Compound
7.description: Increase the radius of Give 'Em Some Pepper by 15%. Each enemy Hero hit by Give 'Em Some Pepper grants Raynor 10 Mana and reduces the cooldown of Penetrating Round by 1.5 seconds.

10.name: Hyperion
10.description: Order the Hyperion to make a strafing run for 12 seconds, hitting up to 4 enemies for 66 (+4% per level) damage every second. Every 4 seconds, it can fire its Yamato Cannon at a Structure, dealing 794 (+4% per level) damage.

10.name: Raynor's Raider
10.description: Summon a Banshee that assists Raynor. The Banshee deals 84 (+4% per level) damage per second and regenerates 75 (+4% per level) Health per second if it hasn't taken damage in the last 4 seconds. Can reactivate to retarget or move the Banshee.  The Banshee respawns automatically after 45 seconds.

13.name: Line 'Em Up
13.description: Reduce the cooldown of Penetrating Round by 3 seconds. Penetrating Round hitting two or more enemy Heroes reduces its cooldown by an additional 3 seconds.

13.name: Giddy-Up
13.description: Gain 10% Movement Speed while mounted and unmounted. Inspire grants 10% more Movement Speed.

13.name: Give Me More!
13.description: While Inspire is active, gain 1 Basic Attack range.  Passive: Increase Adrenaline Rush duration by 0.5 seconds, increasing the total amount healed by 12.5% of Raynor's maximum Health.

16.name: Paint Them Red
16.description: Increase the damage of Penetrating Round by 50% and heal for 90% of the damage Penetrating Round deals to Heroes.

16.name: Rallying Cry
16.description: Increase the Attack Speed bonus of Inspire by 20%.  Passive: After every 12 Basic Attacks, cast Inspire for free.

16.name: Bounty Hunter
16.description: If Give 'Em Some Pepper's target is a Hero, it deals an additional 3% of their maximum Health as damage and grants Raynor 10 Armor for 3 seconds.  Activate Give 'Em Some Pepper to apply it to Raynor's next Basic Attack.

20.name: Cavalry's Arrived
20.description: Give 'Em Some Pepper lowers the cooldown of Hyperion by 5 seconds if the primary target is a Hero. These Heroes are targeted by the Hyperion for 100% increased damage for 6 seconds.

20.name: Dusk Wing
20.description: Increase the Health and leash range of Raynor's Raider by 100%. Its Basic Attack lowers enemy Hero Armor by 3 for 1 second, stacking up to 30.

20.name: Raiders Roll
20.description: Adrenaline Rush grants Unstoppable and continues healing for an additional 2 seconds. The additional duration ends upon reaching 70% Health.

20.name: Sergeant Pepper
20.description: Give 'Em Some Pepper now activates every 3 Basic Attacks.

20.name: Execute Orders
20.description: When Raynor is killed, the Hyperion is cast towards the closest enemy Hero. It lasts 12 seconds, hitting up to 4 enemy Heroes of the lowest Health in the area for 66 (+4% per level) damage every second. Every 4 seconds, it will also fire its Yamato Cannon at the lowest Health enemy Hero, dealing 395 (+4% per level) damage.  Passive: Reduce Raynor's death timer by 35 seconds.

tooltipMarkup.RaynorAceInTheHole: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,RaynorPenetratingRoundDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[AceInTheHole].Modifier"/>%</c> more damage to Stunned or Slowed Heroes.<n/><n/>Enemy Heroes hit by Give 'Em Some Pepper are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,RaynorGiveEmSomePepperAceintheHoleTalentSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RaynorGiveEmSomePepperAceintheHoleTalentSlow,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorAdrenalineRushFightOrFlightTalent: Reduce Adrenaline Rush's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,RaynorMasteryFightorFlightAdrenalineRush,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> seconds. Casting Adrenaline Rush grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RaynorInspireFightOrFlightArmorIncrease,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RaynorInspireFightOrFlightArmorIncrease,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorAdrenalineRushGiveMeMoreTalent: While Inspire is active, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RaynorGiveMeMoreAttackRangeCarryBehavior,Modification.WeaponRange"/></c> Basic Attack range.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Adrenaline Rush duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,RaynorMasteryGiveMeMoreAdrenalineRush,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value" precision="1" player="0"/></c> seconds, increasing the total amount healed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,RaynorAdrenalineRushHealer,RechargeVitalFraction*Talent,RaynorMasteryGiveMeMoreAdrenalineRush,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Behavior,RaynorAdrenalineRushHoT,Period" precision="1" player="0"/>%</c> of Raynor's maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorAdrenalineRushRaidersRoll: Adrenaline Rush grants Unstoppable and continues healing for an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RaynorAdrenalineRushRaidersRollApplyHoT,Duration - Behavior,RaynorAdrenalineRushHoT,Duration"/></c> seconds. The additional duration ends upon reaching <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100 * Validator,CasterVitalityLE70Percent,Value"/>%</c> Health.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorBasicAttackSustainingRounds: Give 'Em Some Pepper heals Raynor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,RaynorSustainingRoundsCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction"player="0"/>%</c> of his maximum Health, increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,RaynorSustainingRoundsCreateHealerHero,RechargeVitalFraction"player="0"/>%</c> if the primary target is a Hero.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorBehemothArmor: Gain bonus maximum Health. Quest: Every time Give 'Em Some Pepper's primary target is a Hero, gain an additional maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorBountyHunter: If Give 'Em Some Pepper's target is a Hero, it deals an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,RaynorBountyHunterDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"precision="2"/>%</c> of their maximum Health as damage and grants Raynor <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RaynorBountyHunterArmorBehavior,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RaynorBountyHunterArmorBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds. <n/><n/>Activate Give 'Em Some Pepper to apply it to Raynor's next Basic Attack.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorCavalrysArrived: Give 'Em Some Pepper lowers the cooldown of Hyperion by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,RaynorHyperionIndomitableResolveModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds if the primary target is a Hero. These Heroes are targeted by the Hyperion for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,HyperionWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[CavalrysArrived].Modifier"/>%</c> increased damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RaynorGiveEmSomePepperCavalrysArrivedBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorExterminator: Basic Attacks deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Effect,RaynorHeroWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[Exterminator].Modifier)"/>%</c> more damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters. This is increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Effect,RaynorHeroWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[Exterminator].Modifier+Effect,RaynorHeroWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[ExterminatorInspire].Modifier)"/>%</c> while Inspire is active. <n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Inspire does not expire on friendly Minions and Mercenaries.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorGive'EmSomePepperSergeantPepper: Give 'Em Some Pepper now activates every <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Basic Attacks.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorGiveEmSomePepper: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="1+Behavior,RaynorGiveEmSomePepperAttackToken,ConditionalEvents[0].CompareValue"/>th</c> Basic Attack splashes in a small area and deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,RaynorHeroWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[GiveEmSomePepper].Modifier"/>%</c> more damage to the main target.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorGiveEmSomePepperUnstableCompound: Increase the radius of Give 'Em Some Pepper by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(100*Talent,RaynorGiveEmSomePepperUnstableCompound,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value)-100"/>%</c>. Each enemy Hero hit by Give 'Em Some Pepper grants Raynor <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RaynorGiveEmSomePepperUnstableCompoundUpdateCatalog,CatalogModifications[0].Value"/></c> Mana and reduces the cooldown of Penetrating Round by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,RaynorGiveEmSomePepperUnstableCompoundTalentModifyUnit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.

Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RaynorHyperionYamatoMissileScan,Period"/></c> seconds, it can fire its Yamato Cannon at a Structure, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RaynorHyperionYamatoDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorHyperionExecuteOrders: When Raynor is killed, the Hyperion is cast towards the closest enemy Hero. It lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HyperionMissileScan,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds, hitting up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HyperionWeaponPersistent,PeriodCount" player="0"/></c> enemy Heroes of the lowest Health in the area for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HyperionWeaponExecuteOrdersDamage,Amount"/></c> damage every second. Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RaynorHyperionYamatoMissileScan,Period"/></c> seconds, it will also fire its Yamato Cannon at the lowest Health enemy Hero, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RaynorHyperionExecuteOrdersYamatoDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.</n></n><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce Raynor's death timer by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,RaynorExecuteOrdersDeathTimerReduction,XP"/></c> seconds.

tooltipMarkup.RaynorInspireFuelTheRush: While Inspire is active, Adrenaline Rush's cooldown reduction from Basic Attacks is increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,RaynorAdrenalineRushFuelTheRushModifyCooldownNonHero,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds against non-Heroes, and to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,RaynorAdrenalineRushFuelTheRushModifyCooldownHero,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse" precision="2"/></c> seconds against Heroes.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce the Mana cost of Adrenaline Rush from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,RaynorAdrenalineRush,Cost.Vital[Energy]"Player="0"/></c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,RaynorAdrenalineRush,Cost.Vital[Energy]+Talent,RaynorInspireFuelTheRush,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"Player="0"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorInspireGiddyUp: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,RaynorGiddyUpMovespeedCarry,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"player="0"/>%</c> Movement Speed while mounted and unmounted. Inspire grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,RaynorInspireGiddyUp,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"player="0"/>%</c> more Movement Speed.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorInspireRallyingCry: Increase the Attack Speed bonus of Inspire by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,RaynorInspireRallyingCry,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/>%</c>.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> After every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RaynorRallyingCryTokenCounter,Max"/></c> Basic Attacks, cast Inspire for free.

Enemies close to Raynor are knocked back further.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorPenetratingRoundHeavySlugs: Increase Penetrating Round's Slow by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Talent,RaynorPenetratingRoundHeavySlugs,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/>%</c> and its duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,RaynorPenetratingRoundHeavySlugs,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorPenetratingRoundLine'EmUp: Reduce the cooldown of Penetrating Round by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,RaynorPenetratingRoundLineEmUpCooldownReduction,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds. Penetrating Round hitting two or more enemy Heroes reduces its cooldown by an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,RaynorPenetratingRoundLineEmUpCooldownReduction,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorPenetratingRoundPaintThemRed: Increase the damage of Penetrating Round by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,RaynorPenetratingRoundDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[PaintThemRed].Modifier"/>%</c> and heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,RaynorPenetratingRoundDamage,LeechFraction[Life]"/>%</c> of the damage Penetrating Round deals to Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorRaynorsRaider: Summon a Banshee that assists Raynor. The Banshee deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RaynorRaynorsRaidersDamage,Amount*2/Weapon,RaynorBansheeMisiles,Period"/></c> damage per second and regenerates <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RaynorRaynorsRaidersCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Health per second if it hasn't taken damage in the last <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Can reactivate to retarget or move the Banshee.<n/><n/>The Banshee respawns automatically after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,RaynorRaynorsRaidersDummy,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorRaynorsRaiderDummy: Summon a Banshee that assists Raynor. The Banshee deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RaynorRaynorsRaidersDamage,Amount*2/Weapon,RaynorBansheeMisiles,Period"/></c> damage per second and regenerates <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RaynorRaynorsRaidersCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Health per second if it hasn't taken damage in the last <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Can reactivate to retarget or move the Banshee.<n/><n/>The Banshee respawns automatically after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,RaynorRaynorsRaidersDummy,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorRaynorsRaidersDuskWingsTalent: Increase the Health and leash range of Raynor's Raider by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,RaynorDuskWing,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/>%</c>. Its Basic Attack lowers enemy Hero Armor by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,RaynorDuskWingArmorDebuff,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RaynorDuskWingArmorDebuff,Duration"/></c> second, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,RaynorDuskWingArmorDebuff,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus*Behavior,RaynorDuskWingArmorDebuff,MaxStackCount"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.RaynorVeteranMarksman: Quest: Every time the primary target of Give 'Em Some Pepper is a Hero, permanently increase its damage bonus by %.Gambit: Gain % bonus Give 'Em Some Pepper damage. Every death reduces this bonus by %.
